channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-04 22:31 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: May the fourth be with you
item.description: May the fourth be with you

item.title: @elonmusk: Singapore Airlines has just announced that it is adopting SpaceX's@Starlink. The rollout will begin ...
item.description: Singapore Airlines has just announced that it is adopting SpaceX's@Starlink. The rollout will begin in Q1 2027 and be completed by end of 2029. "With more than 10,000 satellites launched to low Earth orbit, Starlink can deliver multi-gigabit connectivity to aircraft using its Aero Terminal, which can support up to 1 Gbps per antenna. This means customers in all cabin classes will enjoy faster, smoother, and seamless connectivity from take‑off to landing for activities such as video streaming, sharing content on social media, gaming, and sending large files." - SIA

item.title: @elonmusk: kardashev II necessitates a massive amount of lunar production the future is very exciting
item.description: kardashev II necessitates a massive amount of lunar production the future is very exciting

item.title: @elonmusk: AI morality should be grounded in durable principles like being maximally truth seeking, enabling hu...
item.description: AI morality should be grounded in durable principles like being maximally truth seeking, enabling human agency, freedom of thought + humility under uncertainty Instead of inheriting the moral fashion of the moment and mistaking it for truth

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3 just built this entire game with just a single prompt It has the fastest output token speed...
item.description: Grok 4.3 just built this entire game with just a single prompt It has the fastest output token speed and outranks Claude Sonnet 4.6 Max on Artificial Analysis I built this using the xAI API in Kilo Code via the VS Code extension

item.title: @elonmusk: When your diversity is to delete the heritage of the host, then it’s not diversity at all.
item.description: When your diversity is to delete the heritage of the host, then it’s not diversity at all.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla owners in the Netherlands have driven 10 million km on FSD Supervised in under a month! Thank ...
item.description: Tesla owners in the Netherlands have driven 10 million km on FSD Supervised in under a month! Thank you for making Dutch roads safer 🤝

item.title: @elonmusk: Mark my words, I will take a photo like this in my lifetime. You might, too.
item.description: Mark my words, I will take a photo like this in my lifetime. You might, too.

item.title: @elonmusk: Bono spent 30+ years inside the aid industrial complex and came out saying this:
item.description: Bono spent 30+ years inside the aid industrial complex and came out saying this:

item.title: @elonmusk: Path to Petawatts is Mass drivers on Moon
